projectDescription: A Mintlify documentation site for Illegalcord, aligned with the official installer repository, source repository, pnpm build scripts, plugin folders, settings tabs, and Vencord/Equicord plugin APIs.
keyFeatures: Installation paths for the official ImHisako/IllegalcordInstaller project and source builds from ImHisako/Illegalcord
Source-backed installation with pnpm build, buildWeb, inject, uninject, and repair commands
Repository structure page mapping docs to src, browser, scripts, packages, dist, and plugin folders
Settings documentation matching Illegalcord Settings, Plugins, Themes, Updater, Cloud, Backup & Restore, and Patch Helper
Plugin documentation aligned with src/plugins, src/equicordplugins, and src/userplugins
Troubleshooting focused on dependency install, build, injection, plugin metadata, and settings recovery
publicApiSurface: Common stores and UI helpers from @webpack/common
Declarative plugin fields handled by PluginManager
QuickCSS and theme loading through local settings APIs
